mapper.sql: SELECT ja.id, ja.application_case_id, ja.job_posting_id, ja.job_posting_revision, latest_posting.latest_job_posting_revision AS latest_job_posting_revision, CASE WHEN latest_posting.latest_job_posting_revision IS NOT NULL AND ja.job_posting_revision IS NOT NULL AND ja.job_posting_revision < latest_posting.latest_job_posting_revision THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS stale_against_latest_posting, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ja.employment_type, ja.experience_level, ja.required_skills, ja.preferred_skills, ja.duties, ja.qualifications, ja.difficulty, ja.summary, ja.evidence, ja.ambiguous_conditions, ja.confirmed_at, ja.admin_memo, ja.created_at FROM job_analysis ja JOIN application_case ac ON ja.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT application_case_id, MAX(revision) AS latest_job_posting_revision FROM job_posting GROUP BY application_case_id ) latest_posting ON latest_posting.application_case_id = ja.application_case_id

choose.when: ORDER BY ja.created_at ASC, ja.id ASC
ORDER BY ja.confirmed_at DESC, ja.id DESC
ORDER BY ja.confirmed_at IS NULL, ja.confirmed_at ASC, ja.id ASC
ORDER BY ja.difficulty IS NULL, ja.difficulty DESC, ja.id DESC
ORDER BY ja.difficulty IS NULL, ja.difficulty ASC, ja.id ASC
ORDER BY ac.company_name DESC, ja.id DESC
ORDER BY ac.company_name ASC, ja.id ASC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY ja.created_at DESC, ja.id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ja.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ja.confirmed_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unconfirmed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(ja.difficulty) IN ('EASY', 'LOW') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS easy_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(ja.difficulty) IN ('MEDIUM', 'NORMAL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS medium_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(ja.difficulty) IN ('HARD', 'HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS hard_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ja.difficulty IS NULL OR TRIM(ja.difficulty) = '' OR UPPER(ja.difficulty) NOT IN ('EASY', 'LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'NORMAL', 'HARD', 'HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unknown_difficulty_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ja.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ja.admin_memo) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS memo_count FROM job_analysis ja JOIN application_case ac ON ja.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id
